headline: San Diego Mosque Hero Dad рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹ’Ә SHINES вҳҖпёҸрҹҰё in Deadly Teen Attack рҹ’Ҙрҹҳұ
text: Security Guard Amin Abdullah рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘ҰрҹӣЎпёҸ a father-of-eight рҹ’ӘрҹҚҶ and shining light вҳҖпёҸвңЁ was HAILED рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҷҢ as a TOTAL HERO рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҢҹ after stopping a HATE CRIME рҹ’ўрҹ”« rampage at San Diego mosque рҹ•Ңрҹ’Ҙ! This brave dude рҹ§”вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ә took bullets for the crew рҹҳӨрҹ©ё saving lives like a BOSS рҹҸҶрҹ”Ҙ while two teenage attackers рҹӨЎрҹ‘Ұрҹ”« went full self-own рҹ’Җрҹҡ— after offing themselves blocks away! The mom of one kid рҹ“һрҹҳӯ snitched to cops рҹҡ” that her son ran away рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё with his buddy and might be SUICIDAL вҳ пёҸ but instead they turned the mosque into a BLOODY MESS рҹ©ёрҹ•Ң before popping themselves! Abdullah and two worshippers Mansour Kaziha рҹ§”рҹҢҝ and Nader Awad рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹ“ҡ got killed but this security legend рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ‘‘ who worked there over a decade рҹ•°пёҸвқӨпёҸ was the real MVP рҹҸҶрҹҢҹ always smiling рҹҳҠрҹӨқ greeting EVERYONE from homeless folks рҹҸ рҹ’” to kids and elders рҹ‘¶рҹ‘ҙ making sure they're A-OK вң…! Friends called him the NICEST MAN you'll ever meet рҹҳҚрҹ«Ӯ a true MARTYR рҹ•ҠпёҸрҹ”Ҙ and courageous protector рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ’Ҙ who put himself on the LINE even in his LAST MOMENTS рҹ•°пёҸрҹҳў! The mosque hailed him as a COURAGEOUS MAN who didn't stop protecting the community рҹ•ҢрҹӣЎпёҸ while online fundraiser went BRRRRR рҹ’°рҹҡҖ raising over $1.6M рҹӨ‘рҹҚҶ for his eight kids! Police Chief Scott Wahl рҹҡ”рҹ—ЈпёҸ said 'his actions were HEROIC рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҝ undoubtedly he SAVED LIVES today' рҹ”ҘрҹҷҢ and the attack was fueled by HATE RHETORIC рҹ’ўрҹ—ЈпёҸ making it a full-on HATE CRIME рҹҡ«рҹҳЎ! Cair-SD spokeswoman Tazheen Nizam рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’јвҳ• spilled that Amin was LOVED by EVERYBODY рҹҳҚрҹҢҹ stood day after day with a smile рҹҳҠ welcoming kids to school рҹ“ҡрҹ‘§ and was a SHINING LIGHT вҳҖпёҸвңЁ a TRUE HERO рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ•ҠпёҸ! Friend Shaykh Uthman Ibn Farooq рҹ§”вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ•Ң said he wanted to DEFEND the INNOCENT рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ’Ә so he became a security guard and Sam Hamideh рҹ‘ӢрҹҳҠ remembered him for KINDNESS рҹӨқвқӨпёҸ always making sure random folks off the street were OK вң… even if homeless or elderly! The other victims Kaziha who kept the grounds and store tidy рҹҢҝрҹҸӘ and Awad whose wife teaches at the school рҹ“ҡрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҸ« were also lost but Abdullah's bravery prevented WORSE carnage рҹ’ҘрҹӣЎпёҸ! This dad-of-eight hero рҹҸ рҹ’Ә and community legend рҹҢҹрҹ•Ң will be remembered forever as the ultimate protector рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ”Ҙ who took one for the team even when bullets flew! Rest in power Amin вҳҖпёҸрҹ•ҠпёҸ your light still shines bright вңЁрҹҷҸ!
